image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about short chain fatty acids.
Context visual: They're tiny molecules made in your gut that can do big things.
Escalation visual: These acids can boost your immune system and improve gut health.
Evidence visual: Studies suggest they even help reduce inflammation and lower risk of chronic diseases.
Payoff visual: But remember, research is ongoing. Not all benefits are confirmed yet!
Cta visual: Curious about your gut health? Follow for more science insights!
